Notice Of Hearing On The Motion And Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses And Production Of Documents From Plaintiff And Cross-Defendant Ag, Inc.
Off Calendar Jun-05-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter.

Ruling: DEFENDANT THE DANVILLE GROUP, INC. Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses And Production Of Documents From Plaintiff And Cross-Defendant AG, Inc. is taken off calendar; agreement reached. Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

Notice Of Hearing On The Motion And Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses And Production Of Documents From Plaintiff And Cross-Defendant Ag, Inc.
Off Calendar May-22-2018 Continued To Jun-05-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Michael Hsueh, Esq. 650-327-4200 of Thoits Law for Plaintiff.
Jason Feder, Esq. 415-434-4484 of Foley & Lardner LLP for Defendant Danville Group.

Both sides stipulate to the Judge Pro Tem.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT THE DANVILLE GROUP, INC.'s Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses And Production Of Documents From Plaintiff And Cross-Defendant Ag, Inc.

Motion continued for further hearing on June 5, 2018 at 9:00 am. Protective - confidentiality order signed.

Moving party to prepare an interim order reflecting continuantion of meet and confer process.

Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-26-2018 Set For Trial On Nov-05-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
